mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_OAUTH_MEMBER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_OAUTH_MEMBER VALUES (#{id}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword},
#{memberPicture},
DEFAULT
#{memberName}), #{memberNickname}), #{memberProvider})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PASSWORD, MEMBER_PICTURE, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_NICKNAME, MEMBER_PROVIDER FROM TBL_OAUTH_MEMBER
